title: Mailchimp vs Benchmark Email (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Mailchimp vs Benchmark Email: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Mailchimp vs Benchmark Email: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Mailchimp and Benchmark Email comes down to your specific use case. Mailchimp is built for beginners and small businesses, while Benchmark Email targets small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform.

comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses Wanting An Easy-To-Use Email Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on beginners and small businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform

faq.q: Is Mailchimp better than Benchmark Email?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Mailchimp wins for beginners and small businesses, while Benchmark Email is stronger for small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Benchmark Email?
faq.a: Mailchimp starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Benchmark Email to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
